page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. It features 90 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 45 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 720 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8 GB per vCPU. Storage is bundled, consisting of 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD capacity distributed across eight local drives. The x86_64 architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512, AVX512_vnni, AVX512_bf16, and cryptography accelerations like AES and SHA_NI.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier multi-core CPU performance, with stress-ng multi-core, PassMark CPU, and software compilation tests placing in the top 10% of tested systems. Memory read bandwidth is strong, reaching 6368.24 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 217.31 GB/sec for uncached large blocks, though large block write bandwidth is average at 77.28 GB/sec. The instance demonstrates strong database capabilities, scoring in the top 25% for PassMark database operations and Redis SET operations, which achieve 118.1 million operations per second. Large-model LLM inference text generation remains average, while prompt processing for smaller models reaches top-tier speeds.

Given its high resource density, the c3d-highmem-90-lssd offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring massive memory footprints alongside high-speed local NVMe storage. The combination of dedicated AMD EPYC cores and high-capacity local SSDs makes this instance highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores like Redis, software compilation pipelines, and memory-intensive data processing tasks.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance designed for resource-intensive workloads. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 90 dedicated vCPUs across 45 physical cores, paired with 720 GB of RAM and 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The x86_64 architecture includes AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration. Benchmarks show top-tier multi-core CPU performance, software compilation speeds, and encryption capabilities, alongside strong memory read bandwidth and database operations. While large-block write bandwidth and large-model text generation perform at average levels, the instance excels in multi-threaded execution and prompt processing. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for memory-intensive databases, in-memory caching layers, and large-scale data processing applications that require high-speed local storage and substantial memory capacity.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd is a memory-optimized server featuring 90 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 720 GB RAM, and 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for high-performance database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd features 90 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 720 GB RAM, and 3216 GB NVMe SSD storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized server combining ninety dedicated AMD EPYC cores with high-capacity local NVMe storage for demanding database and analytical workloads.
bullet_points: 90 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and 720 GB of RAM
3216 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU and software compilation performance
Strong database operations and Redis throughput
Optimized for memory-intensive and storage-heavy workloads
